name: Megaport Limited
analysis: MP1's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$19.2900, stop A$13.7031, target A$36.0506 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
